item.description:
What's New

  • Pre-resolve Swift package dependencies for parallel CI builds
  • Parallelize independent CI steps
  • Pin macOS destinations in release and CI
  • Fix Codex window classification by duration
  • Redesign macOS main window
  • Refactor usage tracking and simplify app workflows
  • Update design docs for provider-neutral Timefold identity
  • Record completed provider-core and shadow-engine issues

See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

What's New

  • Add AppIcon.icon to project resources

See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

What's New

  • Remove xcode-skills. Not used
  • rebrand ClaudeMeter as AgentUsage

See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

What's New

  • Restore opt-in Claude token refresh
  • Close unsigned release task

See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

What's New

  • Add explicit unsigned release mode
  • Add hybrid product analytics and diagnostics
  • Refactor menu bar to compact provider-pinned groups
  • Revise release skill for manual signed workflow
  • refactor provider usage orchestration
  • Add Sparkle fullReleaseNotesLink for Version History button

See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.25.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Auto-detect OpenCode Go usage from local database
  • Close ClaudeMeter-edc (appcast history accumulation + backfill)
  • Accumulate Sparkle appcast history instead of regenerating a single-item feed
  • chore: upgrade GitHub Actions to Node.js 24 compatible versions
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.24.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Serve Sparkle appcast from GitHub Pages instead of rate-limited raw.githubusercontent.com
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.23.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Fix unclosed Blog Usage Sync card brace and add missing syncOpenCodeGoService
  • Fix test failures: remove @private from blogUsageSyncStatusText, resultColor, and settingsCard functions
  • Add OpenCode Go configuration UI and settings
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.22.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Auto-refresh expired Claude OAuth token instead of showing stale usage
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.21.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Add allWindowsExpired tests to ClaudeMeterKit
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.20.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Handle no-usage-data state after Claude window resets
  • Add DESIGN.md documenting the app's design system
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.19.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Decouple Claude provider fetch from Codex and OpenCode in refresh
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.18.0
item.description:
What's New

  • bd: update sync.remote
  • Simplify usage history persistence and fix iOS build
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.17.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Persist usage history with SwiftData
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.16.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Cut redundant per-refresh SwiftData work for token usage
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.15.0
item.description:
What's New

  • Default release bump to minor instead of patch
  • Show cached/offline indicator on macOS usage surfaces
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.20
item.description:
What's New

  • Add Fable weekly usage limit window
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.19
item.description:
What's New

  • feat: add Codex rate-limit reset credits display
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.18
item.description:
What's New

  • feat: show Rolling/Weekly/Monthly Usage for OpenCode Go in menu bar
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.17
item.description:
What's New

  • fix: route OpenCode ChatGPT-subscription usage to Codex bucket
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.16
item.description:
What's New

  • fix: keep OpenCode logs in OpenCode bucket
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.15
item.description:
What's New

  • fix: show Max 5x/20x tier in plan display
  • add menu bar right-click planning issues
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.14
item.description:
What's New

  • fix OpenCode provider attribution
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.13
item.description:
What's New

  • Add claude-fable-5 pricing to ModelPricing fallback table
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.12
item.description:
What's New

  • Add claude-sonnet-5 pricing to ModelPricing fallback table
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.11
item.description:
What's New

  • revert: 200k tiered pricing applied to daily aggregates (aeea0f7) (#15)
  • ci: add pull request workflow
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.10
item.description:
What's New

  • Add opt-in Claude OAuth token auto-refresh (macOS)
  • Improve token/cost accuracy & coverage to match ccusage/OpenUsage
  • Improve Claude token cost accuracy: 1h cache tier, fast mode, sidechain dedup
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.9
item.description:
What's New

  • add xcode skills for security, SwiftUI, UIKit, and device interaction
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.8
item.description:
What's New

  • Fix blog account Sign Out silently doing nothing
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.7
item.description:
What's New

  • Trim verbose blog OAuth debug logging
  • Fix blog OAuth client re-registration and Better Auth CSRF/audience requirements
  • Add OAuth 2.1/PKCE blog sign-in for usage sync
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.6
item.description:
What's New

  • Revert "fix menu bar focus jump"
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.5
item.description:
What's New

  • fix menu bar focus jump
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.4
item.description:
What's New

  • Sign release bot commits via the GitHub API
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.3
item.description:
What's New

  • Trigger release after CI signing fix
  • Document the usage endpoint URL constant
  • Extract release logic into local composite actions
  • Address PR review: abort on moved main, create release after signing, pin checkout SHA
  • Automate releases on push to main
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.2
item.description:
What's New

Changed

  • Rebuilt and verified against Xcode 27 / macOS 27 (build and full test suite pass on the new SDK).

Fixed

  • Two environment-dependent test failures: `returnsNilForUnknownModel` raced the live LiteLLM pricing map (which now legitimately prices `gpt-4`) and asserts the static fallback instead; `initialStateIsCorrect` leaked the real app's cached usage snapshot from the shared UserDefaults domain and now stashes and restores it.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Use LiteLLM pricing data as the source of truth for token cost calculations, preferring a configured LiteLLM proxy's `/model/info` pricing and falling back to LiteLLM's hosted model cost map.
  • Refresh LiteLLM pricing before local token imports, zero-cost recalculation, live provider aggregation, and blog usage sync so newly released models such as Claude Mythos/Fable 5 can be priced without hardcoded app updates.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.14.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • **Per-provider service outage detection.** When a provider's usage fetch fails with an HTTP 5xx / service-unavailable error, ClaudeMeter tracks an outage and shows a "Service down" indicator on that provider's card (menu bar popover) and a banner on its detail page (menu bar + Dashboard), while continuing to show cached data. Covers Claude, Codex, and OpenCode; clears automatically on the next successful fetch.

Fixed

  • OpenCode Go dashboard usage windows never parsed due to a malformed regex, so OpenCode rate-limit windows were always missing. The parser now extracts rolling/weekly/monthly usage correctly.
  • Manual refresh is no longer throttled — pressing refresh always fetches immediately.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.13.5
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Stop the remaining macOS keychain authorization prompt on launch, caused by blog usage sync reading its bearer token in-process. The token is now stored and read via the `/usr/bin/security` CLI — whose stable Apple-signed binary lets the keychain "Always Allow" grant persist — instead of in-process keychain APIs that re-prompt on every launch for the unsigned app.
**After updating, re-enter your blog sync token once** in Settings (the old keychain entry was reset as part of this fix). See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.13.4
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Stop a recurring macOS keychain authorization prompt on launch. The app no longer writes a copy of the Claude credentials into its own keychain on every refresh — that write was unused (macOS reads the token directly from Claude Code via the `security` CLI, and iCloud sync is not enabled) and was the source of the repeated "ClaudeMeter wants to use your confidential information" dialog.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.13.3
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Codex 5-hour and weekly windows now read **live** usage from the ChatGPT backend (`/wham/usage`) using the `~/.codex/auth.json` token, instead of stale local rollout logs. Usage consumed via OpenCode/ChatGPT is now reflected, fixing the menu bar showing **0%** when the local Codex CLI logs were stale. On any error the Codex column is hidden rather than showing a fabricated 0%.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.13.2
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Skip Claude Code `` placeholder rows during blog usage sync so zero-token internal messages are not stored as Anthropic model usage.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.13.1
item.description:
What's New

Removed

  • Credentials status section from Settings (no longer needed).
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.13.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • **Multi-provider usage monitoring (macOS):** track **OpenAI Codex CLI** and **OpenCode** alongside Claude.
  • Codex rate-limit windows (5-hour + weekly) and plan, read from local Codex rollout logs — no login required.
  • Token usage & cost for Codex and OpenCode, computed from local logs (OpenCode via its SQLite database) using built-in pricing.
  • **OpenUsage-style menu-bar popover:** a provider sidebar that switches between an overview and per-provider detail pages — each with Status/Console links, window status dots, Today/Yesterday/30-day cost, a usage-trend sparkline, and a per-model breakdown.
  • Shared per-provider cards across the menu bar and Dashboard.
  • "Codex (5h)" menu-bar display toggle in Settings.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.12.2
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix synced usage pricing
  • Align blog usage sync contract
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.12.1
item.description:
What's New

Changed

  • Removed the ccusage backend; the native Claude JSONL parser is now the sole source of token usage and cost. Displayed totals are Claude-only and priced at Anthropic rates, fixing discrepancies caused by ccusage running unscoped across all coding agents with LiteLLM pricing.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.12.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Add passive blog usage sync for local agent usage.
  • Add blog sync settings for endpoint URL, bearer token, manual sync, and sync status.

Fixed

  • Fix release metadata and Sparkle appcast release notes so updater notes render correctly.
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.11.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Track Claude Design usage as a third weekly window (alongside All models and Sonnet)
  • Show Claude Design in macOS menu bar icon, popover, and Dashboard; iOS Dashboard; and Medium/Large widgets
  • Add menuBarShowDesign toggle in macOS Settings (Menu Bar Display)
  • Add notifyDesign threshold notifications in macOS Settings (Notifications)
  • Add Claude Design as a Live Activity metric on iOS

item.title: Version 0.10.9
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix release workflow failing on asset upload by replacing softprops/action-gh-release with gh CLI
  • Add missing GITHUB_TOKEN for gh CLI in release workflow
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.10.5
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix repeating credential file dialog appearing on every auto-refresh cycle when credentials are missing
Previously, when Claude Code credentials were not found, the file picker dialog would appear repeatedly during every auto-refresh cycle (every 5 minutes by default). This release fixes the issue by properly handling the missing credentials case without triggering the dialog. --- See CHANGELOG.md for full release history.

item.title: Version 0.10.4
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix credential loading after Claude Code moved from file to macOS Keychain
Claude Code no longer stores credentials in `~/.claude/.credentials.json`. ClaudeMeter now reads directly from Claude Code's Keychain entry, with a fallback to the file for older CLI versions. See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.10.3
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix Opus 4.6 token usage and costs showing as $0 (add pricing support for new model)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.10.2
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Display app version in menu bar popover footer

Changed

  • Allow multiple app instances to run simultaneously (reverted single-instance enforcement)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.10.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Prevent multiple app instances from running simultaneously (activates existing instance)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.10.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • **Extra usage tracking** for paid accounts - Track cache creation and extra input tokens with cost calculations
  • New settings to control extra usage indicators and notifications
  • Account requirement hint for extra usage feature (requires paid plan with OAuth)

Changed

  • Extra usage cost display now uses dusty plum color for better visual distinction
  • CMD+Q now quits the app completely (restored standard macOS behavior)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.9.3
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • CMD+Q now closes main window instead of quitting app, keeping menu bar alive
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.9.2
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix token usage and costs not updating in background when offline or between API refreshes
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.9.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix background refresh not starting on app launch (broke in 0.9.0 refactor)
--- See CHANGELOG.md for full release history.

item.title: Version 0.9.0
item.description:
What's New

This release focuses on improving code architecture, testability, and error handling.

Added

  • Service protocols for dependency injection and improved testability
  • DependencyContainer for centralized service creation
  • TokenRefreshService for automatic OAuth token refresh
  • Shared utilities in ClaudeMeterKit (DateFormatters, UsageCalculations, WidgetDataStorage)
  • Mock implementations for unit testing
  • Comprehensive unit tests for utilities and edge cases (16+ new tests)
  • Human-readable keychain error messages for better debugging

Changed

  • Refactor architecture with protocol-based services
  • Consolidate duplicated code into ClaudeMeterKit package
  • Extract RefreshScheduler and MenuBarSettingsManager from UsageViewModel
  • Unified WidgetDataManager between app and widget extension

Fixed

  • TokenUsageService now continues processing when individual JSONL files fail (partial success)
  • Improved error handling with descriptive keychain status messages
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.8.3
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix Sparkle auto-update not triggering background checks for menu bar apps
  • Add comprehensive logging for update check debugging (viewable in Console.app)
  • Add "Last Checked" display in Settings to verify update checks are occurring
  • Schedule automatic background check 30 seconds after app launch

Added

  • Debug tool to force background update check (DEBUG builds only)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.8.2
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix false usage reset notifications when at 90%+ capacity (API timestamp precision issue)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.8.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix "Check Now" button disappearing after update check (now stays visible with result text)
  • Fix update check results not auto-dismissing for all result types
  • Fix initial canCheckForUpdates state not syncing on app launch

Changed

  • Increase automatic update check frequency from 24 hours to 4 hours
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.8.0
item.description:
What's New

Changed

  • Redesign menu bar display with multi-line layout showing labels above percentages
  • Add labels (CURR, ALL, SONNET) for better usage window identification
  • Improve rendering with Retina display support via ImageRenderer
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.7.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Token usage errors now display to users instead of failing silently
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.7.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Token usage persistence with SwiftData for faster startup and historical tracking (macOS)
  • ClaudeMeterKit Swift Package for shared models across macOS, iOS, and widgets

Changed

  • Bump iOS deployment target to iOS 18.0
  • Refactor usage data models into shared ClaudeMeterKit package

Fixed

  • Pin GitHub Action to commit hash for improved CI security
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.6.3
item.description:
What's New

Changed

  • Style subscription tier as brand badge for better visual distinction
  • Update labels and fonts to follow Apple Human Interface Guidelines

Fixed

  • Fix Check for Updates button state not updating correctly
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.6.2
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix markdown links not rendering as clickable in Sparkle update dialog
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.6.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Enable automatic update checks by default for menu bar app (fixes update prompts not appearing)
See CHANGELOG.md for full details.

item.title: Version 0.6.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Launch at Login option in Settings to start ClaudeMeter automatically on login

Changed

  • Load usage stats immediately on app launch instead of waiting for menu bar click
  • Improved update checking with better feedback UI and state management
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.5.2
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Countdown timer in menu bar when usage reaches 100%
  • Reset notifications when usage window resets after being near/at limit
  • Keyboard shortcut tooltips on menu bar action buttons (Refresh, Settings, Quit)

Changed

  • Menu bar now shows time remaining until reset when at capacity
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.5.1
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Restore Liquid Glass effect in release builds by updating CI runner to macOS 26
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Usage threshold notifications with customizable alert levels
  • Test notification button in Settings for verifying notification permissions
  • Visual progress bar dividers at 25%, 50%, 75% markers

Changed

  • Updated deployment targets to macOS 15 and iOS 17
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Popover menu with quick access to Settings, About, and Quit
  • Dynamic dock icon behavior (shows when main window is open, hides otherwise)
  • TabView navigation for iOS and macOS platforms

Changed

  • Improved Settings and About tab layouts with better visual hierarchy
  • Added hover effect to menu items for better interactivity
  • Main window no longer shows on launch (menu bar-first experience)
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
What's New

Added

  • Gentle reminders for Sparkle updates in menu bar apps
- Orange badge dot on menu bar icon when update available - "Update Available" banner in popover with View button - System notification posted when scheduled update is found - State resets when user engages with update or session ends See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.2.3
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix invalid code signature in release builds preventing Sparkle updates
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.2.2
item.description:
What's New

Fixed

  • Fix Sparkle update dialog showing raw GitHub page instead of formatted release notes
See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/tartinerlabs/ClaudeMeter/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

item.title: Version 0.2.1
item.description:
What's New in 0.2.1

Fixed

  • Fix Sparkle signature validation for auto-updates
